rationale: fast-check would derive properties from value-bearing function signatures. types.ts exports makeHealthResult (identity factory) which has no derivable property other than `forall(r: HealthResult), makeHealthResult(r) === r`. L0.types-2/3/4 cover all 3 discriminated-union shapes (ok | warn | fail). This is the exhaustive case-coverage equivalent of PBT for a sum type.
